body.receipt_selection: same receipt selection as keel.checkpoint.tsa_imprint.v1: checkpoint.tsa_receipts list wins over legacy checkpoint.tsa; non-object entries are invalid markers
body.precondition: checkpoint.tsa_imprint.v1 remains a separate bind-level claim; this claim does not change its verdict or evidence interpretation
body.validated_rule: The RFC 3161 TimeStampToken CMS signature verifies, the certificate chain anchors in the release-pinned DigiCert/GlobalSign TSA trust bundle or supplied CA material as scoped, the signer certificate has id-kp-timeStamping EKU, certificate validity is evaluated at TSTInfo.genTime, and each non-root chain certificate has a release-pinned CRL whose nextUpdate is after genTime and whose revokedCertificates entries do not carry revocationDate or invalidityDate at or before genTime.
body.not_validated_rule: Use not_validated when the receipt is outside the release-pinned DigiCert/GlobalSign trust bundle, when the runtime lacks OpenSSL 3 chain-validation support, or when a supplied custom CA bundle verifies signature/chain/purpose but has no release-pinned CRL snapshot.
body.invalid_rule: Use invalid when parsing fails after imprint support, the known public-CA provider chain cannot anchor in the release-pinned trust bundle, signer EKU is missing or wrong, certificate validity fails at genTime, a required CRL snapshot is missing or stale at genTime, or revocationDate/invalidityDate is at or before genTime.
body.strict_mode: --require-tsa-chain fails unless aggregate tsa_chain_validation is validated
body.default_mode: additive; top-level checkpoint ok is unchanged unless strict mode or pinned required-claim semantics require checkpoint.tsa_chain.v1
